nasb.text: So they came up to Baal-perazim, and David defeated them there; and David said, “God has broken through my enemies by my hand, like the breakthrough of waters.” Therefore they named that place Baal-perazim.

esv.text: And he went up to Baal-perazim, and David struck them down there. And David said, “God has broken through my enemies by my hand, like a bursting flood.” Therefore the name of that place is called Baal-perazim.

cnv.text: 非利士人上到巴力．毘拉心來，大衛在那裡擊敗了他們。大衛說：“　神藉著我擊潰我的敵人，好像水沖破堤岸一般。”因此他們給那地方起名叫巴力．毘拉心。

ccb.text: 于是，大卫前往巴力·毗拉心，击败了非利士人。他说：“上帝借我的手击溃敌人，如洪水冲垮堤岸。”所以，那地方叫巴力·毗拉心。
